title: Global Variable
text: Global Variable A Global Variable is a Development Object that defines a typed variable that can be accessed by all ProcScript in the application. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: var Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: $$register@ LibraryName .prc URI format: lib: LibraryName :var: VariableName Properties Name Description Data Type Classification Display Format (Global Variable) Comments Specialization Global Variable specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a library as parent object. It has no child objects. Related Links Variables Variables are placeholders for data whose value can change during the runtime duration of the ProcScript module, component, or application for which they have scope. The scope is determined by where they are declared. Working with Global Variables Global variables are accessible to all ProcScript in an application's components, and to global ProcScripts that use the same library or the system library.
